FEE().notice: Returns the ecosystem fee for payment channels.

allPaymentChannels(uint256).notice: Returns the address of the payment channel at the given index.

allPaymentChannelsLength().notice: Returns the total number of payment channels deployed.

deploy((address,address[],string)).notice: Deploys a new payment channel using the provided parameters.

offChainSlugToPaymentChannel(string).notice: Returns the payment channel address associated with the given off-chain slug.
